semantic_description: Verifies lower-bound style binary search that returns the first index whose sorted input array value equals target, or -1 when target does not occur. The loop maintains a half-open search interval [left, right), moves left past elements proven smaller than target, and moves right to mid otherwise. Boundary behavior includes n == 0, missing target, target before all elements, and duplicate target values where the first occurrence must be returned. The function only reads the input array and preserves IntArray::full(a, n, l).
